title: 我平时骑电动车。
pinyin: Wǒ píng shí qí diàn dòng chē.
titleTranslation_en: I Usually Ride an Electric Bike
description_uz: «Odatda ishga qanday borasan?» — kundalik qatnov haqidagi suhbat. Bu dialog elektromopedda yurish, dubulg'a, quvvatlash va masofa, sovuq va yomg'irli kunlar hamda nega mashina o'rniga elektromoped afzalligini muhokama qilishni mashq qiladi. Transport mavzusidagi foydali so'zlar — takrorlab o'rganish uchun ideal.
description_ru: «Как ты обычно добираешься до работы?» — разговор о ежедневных поездках. Диалог тренирует, как обсудить езду на электробайке, шлем, зарядку и запас хода, холод и дождь, и почему электробайк удобнее машины. Полезная транспортная лексика — идеально для повторения.
description_en: «How do you usually get to work?» — a chat about the daily commute. This dialogue practices talking about riding an electric bike, helmets, charging and range, cold and rainy days, and why an e-bike beats a car. Useful transport vocabulary—perfect for repetition.

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ píng shí zěn me qù shàng bān?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Как ты обычно добираешься до работы?
sentences.text_translation_en: How do you usually get to work?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ píng shí qí diàn dòng chē.
sentences.text_translation_en: I usually ride an electric bike.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Qí diàn dòng chē yào dài tóu kuī ma?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Нужно ли надевать шлем на электробайке?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you have to wear a helmet on an electric bike?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Yào, bú dài tóu kuī bù kě yǐ qí.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes, you can't ride without a helmet.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Diàn dòng chē xū yào chōng diàn ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Does an electric bike need charging?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 需要，我两三天充一次电。
sentences.pinyin: Xū yào, wǒ liǎng sān tiān chōng yí cì diàn.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, ikki-uch kunda bir marta quvvatlayman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, я заряжаю раз в два-три дня.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes, I charge it once every two or three days.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Chōng yí cì diàn néng qí duō yuǎn?
sentences.text_translation: Bir marta quvvatlaganda qancha masofaga yurib bo'ladi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сколько можно проехать на одной зарядке?
sentences.text_translation_en: How far can you ride on one charge?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 差不多四十公里，够用了。
sentences.pinyin: Chà bu duō sì shí gōng lǐ, gòu yòng le.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Qí diàn dòng chē lěng ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Is it cold riding an electric bike?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 冬天有点儿冷，要多穿衣服。
sentences.pinyin: Dōng tiān yǒu diǎnr lěng, yào duō chuān yī fu.
sentences.text_translation: Qishda biroz sovuq, ko'proq kiyinish kerak.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Зимой немного холодно, нужно теплее одеваться.
sentences.text_translation_en: In winter it's a bit cold — you need to wear more clothes.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Xià yǔ tiān zěn me bàn?
sentences.text_translation_ru: А что делать в дождливый день?
sentences.text_translation_en: What do you do on rainy days?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Xià yǔ tiān wǒ zuò dì tiě.
sentences.text_translation_ru: В дождь я езжу на метро.
sentences.text_translation_en: On rainy days I take the subway.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ wèi shén me bù kāi chē?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Почему ты не ездишь на машине?
sentences.text_translation_en: Why don't you drive a car?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 开车太堵了，电动车更方便。
sentences.pinyin: Kāi chē tài dǔ le, diàn dòng chē gèng fāng biàn.
sentences.text_translation_ru: На машине слишком много пробок, электробайк удобнее.
sentences.text_translation_en: Driving has too much traffic — an electric bike is more convenient.
sentences.speaker: B
